title: [FIRParser] unexpectedly accepting of invalid FIRRTL
body:
This started with a module definition at the wrong indentation level-- we currently we accept "FIRRTL" like this:

```scala
circuit Oops:
  module Oops:
  input in: UInt
  input out: UInt
  wire w: UInt
  w <- in
  out <- w
```

Producing an empty module "Oops" and discarding the statements.

Poking at things, it seems we even accept things like:

```scala
circuit Oops:
  module Oops:
    input in: UInt<1>
    output out: UInt<1>
    out <- in

  asdf:
    dsfa

asdf
input in: UInt
  input out: UInt
  wire w: UInt
  w <- in
  out <- w
  input in: UInt
```
